strName.description: The code name of the charge profile (often pattern + use-case suffix, e.g. 'FireExCheck' = pattern 'FireEx' + suffix 'Check').

strCondName.description: Condition this profile reads/affects (e.g. StatFireChem). Refers to entry within conditions.json. (Per JsonChargeProfile decomp.)

strItemCT.description: Condition trigger applied to the consumed item. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json.
